meta.title: Christopher Sands interviewed on President Obama's Jobs Bill by CTV
meta.description: On September 14th, Hudson Senior Fellow Christopher Sands discussed President Obama's jobs bill on CTV. How might the jobs bill affect U.S.-Canadian trade?
